samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave Signal Generator</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">Generated triangle waveform signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Generates a triangular waveform by incrementing and decrementing a 5-bit signal "wave." Resets to 0 on active low reset and cycles through values from 0 to 31 before returning to 0.</implementation>
</module>
